title: carex aquatilis subsp. stans
intro: Carex aquatilis subsp. stans, also known as water sedge, is a subspecies of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Carex aquatilis subsp. stans include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Carex aquatilis subsp. stans can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to utilize its medicinal properties.
